revisions.*: Because "rvslots" was not specified, a legacy format has been used for the output. This format is deprecated, and in the future the new format will always be used.

'''3-2-205

Alternative term: Compression chamber

In an electromagnetic horn and certain types of electrodynamic emitters, a flat cavity having the diaphragm as one wall, and which opens into the throat of the horn.


{{IALAFooter}}

{{languages|Air chamber}}
